reviews.comment:
Atencion muy buena pero trato de no ir mas por que se demora mucho las 2 veces que fui espere como 15 minutos mas o menos pero es por que hay muchos autos el resto de 10

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good, but I try not to go back because it takes a long time. Both times I went, I waited about 15 minutes, but that's because there are so many cars. Otherwise, it was great.
